content:
First write \(r=[r]+\{r\}=n+f\) with integer \(n\ge0\) and \(0\le f<1\).  The equation is
\[
25\,f+n=125
\;\Longrightarrow\;
f=\frac{125-n}{25}.
\]
For \(0\le f<1\) we need
\[
0\le 125-n<25
\;\Longrightarrow\;
100<n\le125,
\]
so \(n=101,102,\dots,125\) (25 values).  Then
\[
r_n=n+f=n+\frac{125-n}{25}=\frac{24n+125}{25}.
\]
Their sum is
\[
\sum_{n=101}^{125}r_n
=\sum_{n=101}^{125}\Bigl(n+\frac{125-n}{25}\Bigr)
=\sum_{n=101}^{125}n+\frac1{25}\sum_{n=101}^{125}(125-n)
=2825+12
=2837.
\]
Answer: \(\boxed{2837}\).
